name: cap4d
description: Official repository for the paper "CAP4D: Creating Animatable 4D Portrait Avatars with Morphable Multi-View Diffusion Models"
readme_summary: CAP4D is an official repository for creating animatable 4D portrait avatars from a few reference images using morphable multi-view diffusion models. It enables the generation of dynamic 3D avatars that can be animated and viewed in real-time.
key_features: Creation of animatable 4D portrait avatars
Utilizes morphable multi-view diffusion models
Supports generation from a few reference images
Includes a real-time viewer for exported animations
Provides scripts for quick start, inference, and custom inference
primary_use_case: Generating animatable 4D portrait avatars from input images.
cover_image_prompt: A digital sculptor meticulously chiseling a block of light, transforming it into a lifelike, animated 3D portrait avatar that floats in the air. Multiple reference images of a person are shown on glowing screens surrounding the sculptor, feeding data into the process. The avatar subtly shifts expressions and poses, demonstrating its animatable nature. Small, abstract data streams and diffusion model nodes are visualized as ethereal particles flowing from the screens to the avatar. The scene is set in a clean, futuristic studio with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing creativity and technological advancement. The overall style is a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration with clear iconography and a focus on the transformation process.

name: AI-Asistent-Telegram
description: Умный бот-ассистент для Telegram Business. Подключается к профилю, отвечает от вашего имени. Несколько режимов общения: деловой, агрессивный, заботливый. Встроенные утилиты: калькулятор, погода, перевод, поиск. Полноценная админ-панель для групп: кик, бан, мут, спам-защита, массовое удаление. Автоматическая ротация API-ключей при исчерпании лимитов
readme_summary: This Python repository provides a Telegram bot designed for Telegram Business accounts, acting as a personal AI assistant. It offers AI-powered responses, customizable interaction modes (business, aggressive, caring), and administrative tools for group management, alongside utility functions.
key_features: AI-powered responses (GPT-4.1-mini or fallback API)
Token auto-rotation for GitHub API limits
Aggressive and caring response modes
Group administration commands (kick, ban, mute, spam protection)
Utility functions (calculator, weather, translation, search)
Telegram Business integration as a Personal Assistant
primary_use_case: To automate and enhance communication for Telegram Business accounts by providing an AI assistant that can handle customer interactions, manage groups, and perform various utility tasks.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot assistant wearing a small tie, standing at a sleek, modern desk. In front of the robot is a glowing, open laptop displaying a Telegram chat interface. The robot is gesturing towards the screen, where different colored thought bubbles are emerging: one is a sharp, red 'angry' bubble, another is a soft, pink 'caring' bubble, and a third is a neutral, blue 'business' bubble. Behind the robot, a subtle digital stream of data flows, representing the AI processing, with small icons for a calculator, weather cloud, and translation symbol integrated into the stream. The overall scene is clean, bright, and uses a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clear visual communication of the bot's varied functionalities.

name: ONIX-AternosBot
description: Keep your Aternos server alive 24/7 — controlled from Telegram
readme_summary: ONIX-AternosBot is a JavaScript-based Telegram bot designed to keep Minecraft servers running 24/7. It automates the process of maintaining an active player presence on Aternos servers, allowing users to control and manage the bot directly through a Telegram interface without needing direct server access or command-line interaction.
key_features: Telegram-based menu for bot control (start, stop, logs, settings)
Live configuration changes (address, port, version, nickname, password) without restart
Automatic reconnection with configurable phases
Multiple authentication modes for plugins like AuthMe
Realistic or random nickname generation
Smart AFK behavior with movement and camera rotation
Anti-mob evasion
Optional combat against weak mobs
Ring buffer log displayed in Telegram
primary_use_case: Keeping Minecraft servers, particularly those hosted on platforms like Aternos, online and active 24/7 by simulating an active player, controlled conveniently via Telegram.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, friendly robot character, resembling a Telegram chat bubble with robotic arms, is holding a Minecraft pickaxe and a glowing Telegram logo. The robot is standing guard over a miniature, vibrant Minecraft world displayed on a holographic screen. Data streams, represented by glowing lines of code and chat icons, flow from the Telegram logo towards the Minecraft world, keeping it active and preventing it from fading. The background is a clean, modern digital space with subtle circuit board patterns. The overall mood is helpful and automated. The art style should be 3D isometric illustration with bright, engaging colors and clear, simple forms.
